org.docgene.model

Interface ImageReference

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ElementReference
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    XMLExtendedImage, XMLImage, XMLMessageBox

    public interface ImageReference
extends ElementReference
    Represents an ImageReference.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void bind(org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition image)
      Bind this image reference to its associated image definition.
      default java.io.File getHRef()
      Return the image href File.
      org.docgene.model.globals.ImageDefinition getImage()
      Return the associated image definition.
      java.lang.String getImageID()
      Return the image reference ID.
      java.lang.String getPackage()
      Return the image reference package.
      default boolean hasHRef()
      Return true if this image reference an image path.
      default boolean hasID()
      Return true if this image reference an image ID.
      default boolean hasImageDefinition()
      Return true if this image references an image definition
      default boolean hasImageReference()
      Return true if this image references an image definition or path.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.docgene.model.ElementReference

        getLineNumber, hasLineNumber
